title: BENSALEM POLICE REQUEST HELP LOCATING MISSING ENDANGERED MALE
summary: Bensalem Township Police are seeking the public’s assistance in locating 77-year-old Salim Mohammed. Mr. Mohammed, who suffers from dementia, was last seen leaving his home on April 29, 2026, at approximately 5:15 PM. He is believed to be wearing a black North Face jacket with...
